title: Paint Factory 400ml Professional Quality Fantastic Finish All-Purpose Interior Exterior Household Spray Paint for Wood Metal Plastic Ceramics & More (Metallic Silver)
features: 400ml Professional Quality Fantastic Finish All-Purpose Interior Exterior Household Spray Paint for Wood Metal Plastic Ceramics & More Metallic Silver
description: 151 Multi-Purpose Spray Paints are a versatile way to coat anything inside and outside your home. This spray paint from 151 will help renovate and transform your household. Leaves a fantastic finish on most surfaces; suitable for wood, metal, plastic, ceramic, tiles and more. Simply apply and allow to dry for 16 hours - a great way to revamp your home while keeping costs down. Covers an average of 2m2 per litre. Additionally - Surface Preparation: For best results the surface should be clean, dry and free from loose paint, mould and mildew, wax or oil. If wax has been used, clean the surface thoroughly with white spirit. We recommend sanding bare wood before painting. Hard glossy surfaces should be sanded down before painting. Mask surrounding areas to protect against overspray. Also - You can apply these to a variety of other surfaces including metal, wood, plastic and even glass with the right preparation. Application Site Interior and exterior for use on furniture, metal, wood, plastic, glass and more Surface Treatment Primer 2m² per litre Drying Time 16 hours Recoat Time 4 hours Touch Dry Time 1 hour Paint / Stain / Varnish Base Solvent based VOC Description Very high Litre Capacity 400ml Distressed look by applying. Two coats in contrasting colours then sand / scrub after drying. Highly concentrated.
